annotations.summary: Fraud detection model confidence has dropped below 0.7 (current avg: {{value}})
annotations.description: The LLM-based fraud detection system is producing low-confidence decisions. This may indicate model drift, unusual transaction patterns, or degraded LLM performance.
annotations.runbook:
1. Check if LLM provider has degraded performance (check latency panel)
2. Review recent transaction patterns for anomalies
3. Check token usage — are prompts being truncated?
4. Consider switching to rule-based fallback if confidence stays low
